      </plugin>
    </plugins>
  </reporting>

    <profile>
      <id>setup-checkout</id>
      <activation>
        <file>
          <missing>site-content</missing>
        </file>
      </activation>
      <build>
        <plugins>
          <plugin>
            <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
            <artifactId>maven-antrun-plugin</artifactId>
            <version>1.7</version>
            <executions>

                  </tasks>
                </configuration>
              </execution>
            </executions>
          </plugin>
        </plugins>
      </build>
    </profile>
  </profiles>

</project>
